scripts.copy-cesium: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('node_modules','cesium','Build','Cesium');const dest=path.join('public','cesium');['Workers','ThirdParty','Assets','Widgets'].forEach(d=>{const s=path.join(src,d);const t=path.join(dest,d);if(!fs.existsSync(t)){fs.cpSync(s,t,{recursive:true})}});console.log('Cesium assets copied')"
